channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Head of HBO Explains What it Takes to Get a ‘Game of Thrones’ Spinoff Going
item.description: Don't expect another Westeros show to rush into production, even after the success of 'A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms' and 'House of the Dragon.'

item.title: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
item.description: Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment. From audacious plans to launch data centers into […]

item.title: Les 3 forfaits de la semaine : beaucoup de gigas, trois réseaux et moins de 10 euros par mois
item.description: Free, Syma et YouPrice occupent cette semaine le terrain avec trois forfaits à moins de 10 euros, chacun avec ses arguments sur la data, le réseau et les services.

item.title: Anker’s 160W Prime Charger can power three devices at once, and it’s $50 off
item.description: If you’re constantly switching between working at home and on the go, Anker’s latest 160W Prime Charger can lighten your load by replacing multiple chargers with a single device. It’s normally $149.99, but right now you can buy it at both Amazon and Anker’s online storefront (with coupon code WS24MNV8G7) for $99.99 thanks to Amazon’s […]

item.title: Crunchyroll is now available as a channel in the Apple TV app
item.description: If you're still using Crunchyroll after its AI subtitle fiasco and subsequent price increase, there's a new way to watch. The anime streaming service is now available as a channel in the Apple TV app.That means you can subscribe and stream your favorite anime titles, all within Apple's video app. No need for the Crunchyroll app or a separate login. (Your Apple account handles your subscription using this method.) 9to5Mac notes that this is the first significant new channel added to the TV app in some time.Crunchyroll starts at $10 per month, after the platform raised all of its monthly subscri...

item.title: 'Totally wild': mini PC vendor delivers most powerful computer under $400 with savage 48% discount and it’s a great alternative to the Apple Mac mini
item.description: A mini PC deal under $400, and I can't see any significant corners cut either.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Lawyer Claims Jury’s 420 ‘Joke’ Proves He Didn’t Receive a Fair Trial
item.description: Live by the weed joke, die by the weed joke.

item.title: Back up and secure your computers with Acronis True Image — now 50% off for a limited time
item.description: Big savings on home backup, antivirus, and malware software from Acronis.

item.title: Test de l’Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2 : est-ce l’imprimante 3D qui fait trembler le trône de Bambu Lab ?
item.description: Nous avons testé la nouvelle Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2. La dernière imprimante 3D FDM du constructeur vient prendre la suite d'un premier modèle déjà réussi. Est-ce que la nouvelle génération est à la hauteur ? Réponse au sein de notre test.

item.title: Don't tell the boss: I found the 12 best hybrid office and gaming chairs in Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: As a gamer and office chair reviewer, these are my top picks for both work and play.

item.title: If you live in Georgia, there's a new exhibit you can visit celebrating Apple's 50th anniversary
item.description: The Mimms Museum of Technology and Art in Roswell, Georgia is debuting a new exhibit celebrating Apple's 50th anniversary. The exhibit, iNSPIRE: 50 Years of Innovation from Apple, is set to open on April 1, the date the company was founded, and includes "more than 2,000 artifacts across 20,000 square feet, making it the largest public display of Apple products in the world." iNSPIRE is supposed to offer "a unique look" into Apple, by "highlighting early computers, rare prototypes, original documentation and immersive installations inspired by Apple’s most iconic products and campaigns." Based ...

item.title: How to watch HBO Max for less in 2026
item.description: Home to Game of Thrones, Harry Potter, The Pitt, and Rooster, here's how to watch HBO Max for less in 2026 – and from anywhere with a VPN.

item.title: ‘Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice’ Is a Genre Blending Delight
item.description: Two Vince Vaughns star along with James Marsden and Eiza González in the sci-fi, action, comedy, gangster film now on Hulu.

item.title: Your tax refund could be delayed—and the IRS says you need to act fast
item.description: Filers have just 30 days to update banking info before facing longer waits. Tax refunds are typically a welcomed reprieve for millions of Americans facing challenging financial times. While many tax filers are set to receive higher refunds this year, around 1.4 million Americans who typically receive paper refund checks may have to wait longer for their refund this year because the federal government has moved to phase out the paper check option....

item.title: European Commission confirms cyberattack after hackers claim data breach
item.description: The European Union's top executive body has confirmed a cyberattack after hackers reportedly stole reams of data from the European Commission's cloud storage.

item.title: It looks like we're finally getting an Ocarina of Time remake
item.description: After years of rumors and countless fan-made Unreal Engine tech demos of varying quality, it sounds like we might finally be getting a ground-up remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time. That’s according to Nintendo insider NatetheHate, who said in the latest edition of his podcast that a remake of the seminal Nintendo 64 game would be coming to Switch 2 in the second half of 2026. The reliable tipster said he doesn’t know whether Nintendo is making a 1:1 remake of the original 3D Zelda entry, or something "that’s a little more free to explore design choices," adding that he was initiall...

item.title: 'No clicks, no permission prompts. Just visit a page, and an attacker completely controls your browser': Experts warn Claude Chrome extension could let hackers hijack your online browsing
item.description: Prompt injection attacks can now be carried out in browser extensions, experts warn.

item.title: 'A pleasure to print': Finally, our best printer for the home office gets a price cut in Amazon's Spring Sale — save $100 on this feature-packed Epson EcoTank ink tank unit
item.description: Our senior printer editor said, "I can’t find another mid-price printer so loaded with features and ink."

item.title: Apple prouve enfin qu’il peut se passer de Qualcomm
item.description: On prédisait des difficultés pour le modem maison d'Apple, c'est tout l'inverse. Qualcomm a du souci à se faire pour ses futures puces X85.

item.title: Your job isn’t disappearing—it’s shapeshifting
item.description: The question is whether you’ll shapeshift with it. Panic doesn’t have a strategy. I talk to a lot of people who are quietly terrified about their careers right now, wondering if the thing they spent 15 years getting good at is about to become irrelevant. The kind of fear where you smile through another LinkedIn post about AI productivity gains and feel your stomach drop....

item.title: Leaked Anthropic Model Presents ‘Unprecedented Cybersecurity Risks,’ Much to Pentagon’s Pleasure
item.description: This is all a pretty good ad for Anthropic.

item.title: This Premium Sennheiser Soundbar Is $1,000 Off
item.description: Save big on this oversized Sennheiser soundbar with lots of ports and excellent virtual surround.

item.title: The original Hollow Knight just got an update to fix a glitch with a final boss
item.description: Team Cherry just fixed a bug with the original Hollow Knight, according to a report by GamesRadar. That game came out a full nine years ago, so it's pretty impressive that the dev team is still cranking out updates. Spoilers follow, but it's been nine years so whatever. The update involves a glitch regarding an attack from The Radiance, one of the final bosses of the game. At later stages, she tosses out these honing balls of light. These are difficult to avoid on their own, but a glitch made it so the balls of light occasionally lingered in the air after finishing. This added yet another way ...

item.title: MacBook Air M5, Pokémon Pokopia et HDD 5 To : les 3 meilleures promos tech du vendredi 27 mars 2026
item.description: La fin de semaine s’annonce riche en bons plans high‑tech. Ce vendredi 27 mars 2026, plusieurs produits très recherchés profitent de réductions intéressantes. Découvrez celles qui ont retenu notre attention.

item.title: Forget the Oakley Meta Vanguard — these lesser-known smart specs for runners incorporate a real heads-up display
item.description: Meet the engo3 smart glasses, with an AR heads-up display compatible with Apple and Garmin watches.

item.title: ‘Jeopardy!’ just got a YouTube makeover—and it’s nothing like the TV version
item.description: The new edition features influencers, platform-inspired categories, and livestream gameplay hosted by Ken Jennings. Jeopardy! may have been born on cable television, but it’s determined not to live and die there.

item.title: Black Ops 7 Season 3 is almost here — and it's full of Call of Duty nostalgia
item.description: Here's everything you need to know about what's coming to Black Ops 7 multiplayer in Season 3.

item.title: Le jour où une astronaute a pris une photo d'un gigantesque jet lumineux au-dessus de la Terre
item.description: Le 3 juillet 2025, un impressionnant rayon lumineux semblant s’échapper de la Terre a été capturé en image par l’astronaute Nichole Ayers. Cette scientifique de la Nasa a pris ce cliché incroyable depuis la Station spatiale internationale et elle a ensuite partagé le cliché sur le réseau social...

item.title: Kodak’s 65x zoom ‘bridge’ camera is back – but I’m not about to take it on safari
item.description: Kodak's affordable do-it-all camera returns with the updated PixPro AZ653, adding USB-C charging to a versatile feature set, including 65x zoom and macro mode

item.title: Vélo électrique Moustache : tout comprendre à la gamme et quel modèle choisir
item.description: Avec plus de 70 modèles au catalogue, Moustache propose des vélos électriques ciblant chacun un besoin spécifique. Voici notre guide pour comprendre leurs différences et bien choisir son VAE parmi cette offre pléthorique. Quel vélo électrique Moustache choisir ?

item.title: PlayStation 5 Pro : la fonction « Améliorer la qualité d’image du PSSR » ne sera pas mise à jour vers les futures versions du PSSR
item.description: En interview, Mark Cerny, principal responsable de l'architecture de la PlayStation 5 et 5 Pro, explique que la nouvelle fonction permettant d'améliorer le PSSR restera telle qu'elle est aujourd'hui.

item.title: Inside the creative collaboration that turned JFK Jr.’s political magazine into a sexed-up cultural moment
item.description: ‘We got really good at taking something completely not visual and making it visual.’ It was 1997, and Matt Berman, the creative director of JFK Jr.’s George magazine, had just gotten back to his hotel in Los Angeles. He had left the ‘Garden of Eden’ style set he’d concocted for the cover of the September issue: lush with greenery and replete with live animals. It would reach peak ripeness once the star, Pam Anderson, arrived on set the next day as the “first woman,” to illustrate a feature on the 20 most fascinating women in politics. ...

item.title: Don't sleep on this great Acronis Cyber Protect deal with 20% off
item.description: Grab 20% off subscriptions for all Acronis Cyber Protect products for one year

item.title: 'Each vulnerability exposes a different class of enterprise data': LangChain framework hit by several worrying security issues — here's what we know
item.description: LangChain and LangGraph have patched three high-severity and critical bugs.

item.title: There's no escaping price hikes on gaming hardware — and that's why it's time to make a move for a new handheld now
item.description: The price hikes across gaming hardware are at an all-time high, so it's time to move for your next handheld before it gets struck by the RAM crisis.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 45+ Amazon Big Spring Sale tech deals Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: Meilleurs PC portables pour étudiant en 2026 : le comparatif des modèles recommandés
item.description: L’ordinateur portable est le compagnon indispensable de l’étudiant moderne. Que ce soit pour prendre des notes en cours ou suivre des cours en visio, un laptop est indispensable pour accompagner des études supérieures. Nous avons testé et rassemblé ici les meilleurs PC portables pour étudiants.

item.title: Aetherflux reportedly raising Series B at $2 billion valuation
item.description: Index Ventures is said to be leading a $250 million to $350 million round.

item.title: The Secret to Better Sperm? It’s Probably Already on Your Schedule
item.description: Regular masturbation and sex might be key to keeping your sperm healthy, a new review finds.

item.title: I found 20+ noise-cancelling headphones to shop in the Amazon Spring Sale: Bose headphones are finally discounted
item.description: During the Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can grab noise-cancelling headphones starting at $42. Plus, grab Sony headphones for 46% off.

item.title: How strategic oil reserves work and why they matter now
item.description: Strategic reserves are a system of national oil stocks intended to replace at least 90 days of each country’s imports. In the second week of the Iran war—with the Strait of Hormuz effectively closed, cutting off shipping of 20% of the world’s oil supply—the International Energy Agency announced the largest release of strategic oil reserves in history. Thirty-two countries will sell a combined 412 million barrels from their reserves into the global market over four months, beginning in late March 2026....
